title: myoxanthus reymondii
intro: Myoxanthus reymondii, also known as the Purple Butterfly Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and soothing respiratory issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Herbal preparations of Myoxanthus reymondii can be found in the form of teas and infusions, although these are not widely available due to the plant's rarity and limited cultivation.
